basic_details.job_title: SVNIT Surat Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Urban Planner / Transport Planner Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat (SVNIT Surat)
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat (SVNIT Surat) Urban Planner / Transport Planner Notification 2026 has been released on 10 June 2026 on the official website of SVNIT Surat. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the SVNIT Surat Recruitment 2026 for the posts of Urban Planner and Transport Planner.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E. / B.Tech. (Civil)/ B. Arch with M.E. / M.Tech / M.Plan (Urban Planning/ Urban Design/ Transport Planning/ Transportation Engineering & Planning / Highway & Transportation Engineering / Transportation Engineering), Any PG degree like MURP, M Design, Planning, MCP etc from reputed Institute
qualification.details: Urban Planner / Transport Planner: B.E. / B.Tech. (Civil)/ B. Arch with M.E. / M.Tech / M.Plan (Urban Planning/ Urban Design/ Transport Planning/ Transportation Engineering & Planning / Highway & Transportation Engineering / Transportation Engineering). Any PG degree like MURP, M Design, Planning, MCP etc from reputed Institute will be considered equivalent to M.E/M.Tech/M Plan (Working experience if any after Graduation or Post Graduation both will be considered).

salary_details.details: Urban Planner / Transport Planner: Rs. 40000 Per Month

all_official_links.label: Download SVNIT Surat Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SVNIT Surat Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Urban Planner / Transport Planner posts at SVNIT Surat is scheduled for 23 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Urban Planner / Transport Planner posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E. / B.Tech. (Civil)/ B. Arch with M.E. / M.Tech / M.Plan in relevant fields or an equivalent PG degree from a reputed institute.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Urban Planner / Transport Planner positions?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by SVNIT Surat for the Urban Planner and Transport Planner roles.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for these contract positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000 per month for these contract positions.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for SVNIT Surat Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the SVNIT Surat recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification. Candidates need to attend the interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview for SVNIT Surat Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at Sardar Vallabhbhai National Institute of Technology, Surat. The exact venue address will be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any age relaxations for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any age limits or relaxations. Candidates are advised to check the detailed advertisement for this information.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Urban Planner / Transport Planner posts?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for contract-based positions. Selected candidates will be appointed on a contract basis for the duration specified in the official notification.
